events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, songwriter, and astrophysicist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Rock God Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the one and only Brian May! What's your favourite Queen track featuring his iconic guitar work?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, marks his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Stones Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still rocking stages worldwide! Happy Birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger.

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched in the US on this day in 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being the first music video ever aired.

angles.name: MTV Anniversary
angles.copy: Remember when MTV actually played music videos? 45 years ago today, it all began with The Buggles. Did video really kill the radio star?

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe' 32 years ago
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994, featuring classics like 'Supersonic' and 'Live Forever'.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the game. What's your standout track from their explosive debut?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in counterculture history, kicked off on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years since half a million people descended on a dairy farm for '3 Days of Peace & Music'. The spirit of Woodstock lives on.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: The music world remembers Elvis Presley, who passed away on this day in 1977 at the age of 42. He would have been 91.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: On this day in 1977, we lost the King of Rock 'n' Roll, Elvis Presley. His legacy continues to inspire generations.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: The hip-hop world remembers Tupac Shakur, who tragically died on this day in 1996 at the age of 25. He would have been 55.

angles.name: Tupac Remembered
angles.copy: 30 years since we lost a true icon. Remembering Tupac Shakur, a voice that continues to resonate.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: The music world marks the passing of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who died on this day in 1970 at the age of 27. He would have been 84.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix, who left us on this day in 1970. His guitar still screams.

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road' 57 years ago
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic 'Abbey Road' album on this day in the UK in 1969, featuring the famous zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. Which side of the album do you spin first?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! Still a force of nature in rock and roll.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and solo star Liam Gallagher marks his 54th birthday.

angles.name: LG Birthday
angles.copy: Our Kid is 54 today! Happy Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: John Lennon released 'Imagine' 55 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic peace anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single in the US on this day in 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon asked us to 'Imagine'. A timeless message that still resonates today.

events.title: Apple launched the first iPod 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the original iPod on this day in 2001, revolutionising how we carry our music with '1,000 songs in your pocket.'

angles.name: iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: A quarter-century since the iPod changed everything. Remember your first one? The click wheel was revolutionary!

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated annually as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of 'Dr. No' in 1962.

angles.name: Bond Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Who's your favourite Bond and what's the ultimate 007 theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: The world remembers John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Lennon Birthday Tribute
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we're celebrating the enduring legacy of John Lennon.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: Legendary comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Cleese Birthday
angles.copy: From Python to Fawlty, a very happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! What's your favourite of his iconic roles?

events.title: The Beatles released 'The White Album' 58 years ago
events.blurb: The Beatles' self-titled double album, famously known as 'The White Album', was released on this day in 1968.

angles.name: White Album Anniversary
angles.copy: 58 years since The Beatles delivered the expansive 'White Album'. Which track from the double LP is essential listening for you?
